goal: Embed git SHA + src-hash stamp into built exe at build time. scripts/build-bun-release.mjs writes lib/build-stamp.generated.cjs with { sha, hash, builtAt } before running bun build --compile. bin/gad-version.cjs reads the stamp and exposes via 'gad version --verbose'. Precommit hook (66-04) uses the stamp to decide staleness.
